name: node-spdx-correct
title: node-spdx-correct
description:
correct invalid SPDX identifiers
This package verifies the correctness of SPDX identifiers.
.
SPDX identifiers are unique and machine‑readable names for specific
software licenses.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-spdx-correct because correct invalid SPDX identifiers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-spdx-correct as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-spdx-correct with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-spdx-correct --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
